title: Trump calls Netanyahu 'f**king crazy' — demands Beirut strike cancellation; 'Everybody hates you now. Everybody hates Israel'
snippet: In a heated phone call, Trump tells Netanyahu: 'I'm saving your ass. Everybody hates you now. Everybody hates Israel.' Also says: 'You'd be in prison if it weren't for me.' Demands cancellation of planned Beirut/Dahieh strikes that are undermining US-Iran peace process. Most confrontational Trump-Netanyahu exchange reported during the conflict.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 트럼프-네타냐후 간 전쟁 이래 가장 격렬한 통화 내용 유출. 트럼프가 네타냐후에게 '미친놈'이라 부르며 베이루트 공격 중단 요구. 미-이스라엘 관계의 새로운 긴장점
